description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the debian Docker image and defines a deploy stage with a job named update:all. In the before_script of the job run apt update, apt -y upgrade, and apt install -y jq curl git. Then execute the script bash ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/deploy/update_all.sh. The job runs in the deploy stage and has no additional caches, artifacts, services, or rules.
